### Post by SeijiSensei on 2012-01-23
> *** glibc detected *** /usr/bin/melt: double free or corruption (!prev): 0x0000000004beb7a0 ***


I searched for that error on Google and found four or five other postings dating back as far as 2005 or so.

Are you sure all your software is up-to-date?  There seems to be a problem with the **melt** program and glibc.

If you can save the output to a different format than XviD, you can use mencoder to do two-pass encoding as described [here]("http://en.gentoo-wiki.com/wiki/Mencoder#XviD_Two-Pass_Encoding").
